description:
Under Health Insurance Portability, you can switch between insurance companies and also between insurance plans. And that too, without losing on the continuity benefits.

In this video , we have shared the process to port the policy , pros & cons of the portability process & also answered the most answered questions asked on Health Insurance Portability.

This is your ULTIMATE Health Insurance Portability Guide. 

WATCH THE VIDEO FOR MORE DETAILS :)
To buy insurance policies, click here - https://bit.ly/YoutubeHareepatti
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
For any queries:
📲 WhatsApp : https://wa.me/message/VJCYEKX3EWHOE1
📞 Call : 9650706699
💌  Mail us at: info@hareepatti.com
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
✅ TIME STAMPS :-
0:00  Introduction
0:47  What is Portability ?
1:45  Difference Between Portability & Migration
4:07  Advantages of Portability
6:16  Disadvantages of Portability
7:50  Portability Process
8:50  Things to Keep in Mind before Porting
11:01  Conclusion
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

comments.text: In March I tried to port from Star to Niva Bhupa, In star i have served 2 years till March 25, But when I enquired about whether any slow growing disease will be covered since I have already served waiting periods of 2 Year, then niva bupa has denied the same and told me that I have to serve another one year for slow growing disease post porting with them. Till now I don't understand why, but they told me that IRDA allows this criteria. So ultimately Conclusion is that if you have already served a waiting period i.e 2 Year for a slow growing disease with one company and in 3rd Year you want to port then pls confirm whether the slow growing disease treatment will be covered or not, In my Case Niva Bupa has denied the same.

11.) 01.05.2025 ko again discharge start again one stitches dr. ko 02.05.2025 ko consult kiya dr. ne 2  test karwane ko kha HbA1c or Plasma glucose PP report normal thi 5day ki medicine repeat ki same.                         12.) Rakesh durkhure.                                    13.) Humm same time same day per dr. Rakesh durkhure surgeon ke pass gaye unhone examin kiya meri wife ko or ek MRI ATENTERIOR ABDOMINAL WALL LOWER ABDOMEN karane ko bola or is MRI ki report ke sath milne ko kha.                             14.) Humne MRI ki report or Jo bhi Artimist hospital Gurgaon mai dr. se discuss kiya wo humne apni old gynecologist dr. ko bhi discuss kiya unhone MRI report ko dekh ker kha ki ye delivery ke baad nahi hota isko operation se discharge thik kiya jayega or infected part ko lab mai bhejenge.                 15.) Humm 15.05.2025 ko report ke sath mile dr. se unhone kha ki inko MRI mai utrine sinus aya h isko operation se discharge dignos kiya jayega medicine se nahi hoga or unhone apne prescription per sari details ko likha or TPA desk per humne sare documents submit kiye 17.052025 ko.                   16.) 17.05.2025 ko merko initial approval bheja insurance walo ne jismai hospital ne 1,35,528 rs ka package diya tha 40k initial approval bheja or baki discharge ke time full & final payment karte insurance wale but mere Ghar walo ne kha ki hospital ka distance ghar se kafi dur h or room ka 2000 se uper nahi denge or uper se Kitna Dena pade pata nahi phir bacha bhi chota h isliye Maine surgery apni phale wali gynecologist dr. se hi karwana sahi laga MRI report ko mai apni gynecologist dr. Phale wali ko bhi share ki unhone bhi wohi kha MRI report ko dekh kar Jo Artimist ke dr. ne kha or after operation hum is sinus track ke part ko lab mai culture test ke liye bhejenge Taki pata lage root cause kiya h ye discharge ane ka.             17.) 18.05.2025 ko maine operation karwa diya or 20.05.2025 ko discharge mil gaya hospital se 18.05.2025 ko sample lab mai bhejha usmai report mai meri wife ko tuberculosis h is wajha se discharge nahi ruk rha tha.      18.) Same dignos ke liye jab mai apko apke network hospital se same documents TPA desk ke through diya to apne 135528 ke bill ko accept Karke 40k ka initial approval bheja diya or approval bhi apki dr. team se consult karke hi aya hoga or Jo documents diye usmai sari history clear mention thi or ye same dignos kuck fund issue or hospital distance ki wajha se maine apni old gynecologist se operation karwaya jiska bill 78,798 rs ka amount ko ab app maternity se related kar rahe ho apki dr. team kha rahi h app merko clause 3.1.1.8. ka likha hua dikha rahe h phale kiyo nahi dekha apki dr. team ne. comments.text: for the purpose of this section complicated pregnancy means a medical arising during the antenatal stages of pregnancy or medical condition arising during childbirth requires a recognized obstetric procedure and post-natal-check-ups as a result of the complication of pregnancy for a periods upto six weeks
comments.author: @harishKumar-uh1kh

comments.text:
Section 3.1.1.8 of the Niva Bupa Health Insurance document is about Maternity Expenses. इसका आसान मतलब नीचे दिया गया है:


---

📌 क्या कवर किया गया है (What is covered):

अगर गर्भावस्था के दौरान या डिलीवरी (साधारण या सिजेरियन) के समय कोई मेडिकल खर्च आता है, तो वह खर्च बीमा कंपनी देगी – लेकिन कुछ शर्तों के साथ।


---

✅ शर्तें (Conditions):

1. यह लाभ तभी मिलेगा जब महिला की उम्र 18 साल या उससे ज्यादा हो।


2. पति और पत्नी दोनों एक ही फैमिली फ्लोटर पॉलिसी में शामिल हों।


3. यह लाभ इंडिविजुअल पॉलिसी में नहीं मिलेगा।


4. महिला पहले दिन से ही इस पॉलिसी में शामिल हो और पॉलिसी में मैटरनिटी कवर का उल्लेख हो।


5. खर्च "reasonable and customary" होना चाहिए (यानी जरूरत के अनुसार और नॉर्मल रेट पर)।


6. यह लाभ एक ही बार मिलेगा – सिर्फ एक बार प्रेगनेंसी या डिलीवरी के लिए।


7. अगर प्रेगनेंसी में कोई complication या गर्भपात होता है, तो वह खर्च भी कवर रहेगा।


8. अगर आपने पॉलिसी Renew की है और उसमें कवर की राशि बढ़ाई गई है, तो नए लिमिट के अनुसार ही खर्च दिया जाएगा।


9. दोबारा से यह लाभ (Re-Fill) उसी केस के लिए नहीं मिलेगा।


10. कुछ Permanent Exclusions (जो सेक्शन में दिए हैं) इस बेनिफिट पर लागू नहीं होंगे।




---

ℹ️ नोट:

"Complicated Pregnancy" का मतलब है: अगर प्रेगनेंसी में कोई मेडिकल दिक्कत आ जाए (जैसे बच्चा सही पोजीशन में न हो, या डिलीवरी के बाद कोई गंभीर दिक्कत हो) तो वह इस कवर में शामिल हो सकता है।
